│ Edge (Cloudflare/Netlify)│  ← auth, redirect, A/B, header transform
└───────────┬──────────────┘
            │
  ┌─────────┴─────────┐
  ▼                   ▼
┌─────────┐    ┌──────────────┐
│ Serverless│  │ Container      │
│ (Lambda) │  │ (ECS/K8s/Fly)  │
│ short task│  │ stateful/heavy │
└─────────┘    └──────────────┘
        │              │
        └───────┬──────┘
                ▼
        DB / Queue / Cache

Decision framework

  • Legacy enterprise, huge codebase, 100% npm compat → Node.js + traditional container
  • Greenfield TS API, fast iteration → Bun + Railway/Fly + Postgres
  • Secure-by-default, privacy-critical, edge-global → Deno + Deno Deploy
  • Low latency globally, read-heavy → Cloudflare Workers + KV/D1
  • Already on Supabase stack → Supabase Edge Functions + Postgres + Auth
  • Jamstack site + forms/middleware → Netlify Edge Functions
  • Heavy compute, ML, long-running → Node/Bun + Kubernetes

Portability - write once, deploy many

Web Standards API (fetch, Request, Response) দিয়ে code লিখলে Node, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers - সব target-এ deploy করা যায়। Framework choice matters:

  • Hono - সব runtime support, web-standards core
  • Express - Node + Bun (compat), edge নেই
  • Elysia - Bun-only tightly
  • NestJS - Node primary, Bun/Deno experimental
2026 advice: Greenfield project-এ Bun দিয়ে শুরু (fast dev loop) + Hono framework (portable)। Scale হলে runtime switch করা সহজ - code lock-in নেই।

compare.title: Quick Reference Compare
compare.content:
Frontend রেন্ডারিং

ApproachHTML কখন তৈরিউদাহরণ
CSRBrowser-এ JS run-এর পরCreate React App, Vite SPA

SSGBuild timeAstro, Next.js static, TanStack Start prerender
ISRBuild + background refreshNext.js revalidate
Streaming SSRHTML stream + progressive hydrationNext.js App Router, TanStack Start, React Router v7
RSCServer-এ render, client-এ data হিসেবে composeNext.js App Router, TanStack Start

React Meta-framework (2026)

FrameworkRoutingRSCবিশেষত্ব
Next.jsFile-based App Router✓ (opinionated)Batteries included, huge adoption, RSC pioneer
TanStack StartType-safe (TanStack Router), file বা code-based✓ (RSC as data, cache-agnostic)Server functions (auto-RPC), top SSR throughput, deploy anywhere (Cloudflare/Node/Bun/Netlify)
React Router v7 (ex-Remix)File-based nested✓ (unstable Framework Mode)Vite + HMR, loader/action, form-first, Remix + RR unified
AstroFile-based✗ (islands)Content-heavy, near-zero JS default
TanStack Start-এর RSC edge: Next.js-এর RSC opinionated - specific cache model + rendering pipeline tied। TanStack Start RSC-কে "server-rendered data" হিসেবে treat করে - client নিজের cache (TanStack Query, Router cache) দিয়ে compose করতে পারে। এই flexibility + server function auto-RPC-এর জন্য 2026-এ অনেকে TanStack Start prefer করছে।

Reactivity frameworks

FrameworkDefault modelFine-grained option
ReactVDOM + diff (component re-run)useSyncExternalStore + signal lib (@preact/signals-react, Legend State, TanStack Store, Jotai)

Vue 3Proxy-based reactivity (ref, reactive, computed)Native FGR
Svelte 5Compile-time signals (runes: $state, $derived)Native
AngularRxJS + Zone.js + signals (modern)Native signals (2024+)
Note: "Signals vs VDOM" dichotomy misleading - React useSyncExternalStore (official API) দিয়ে external signal store-এ tear-free subscribe করা যায়, concurrent-safe fine-grained update সহ। SolidJS native, React opt-in - কিন্তু দুটোই possible।

Backend framework decision

Express

Minimalist, huge ecosystem, legacy comfort।

Fastify

2–3× faster, schema-based validation।

NestJS

OOP + DI + decorators, enterprise-y।

Hono

Edge-first, tiny, TypeScript-native।

Bun.serve

Native fast, no framework lock-in।

Pagination approach

ApproachBest for
OffsetAdmin pages, small dataset, jump to page N
CursorFeed, large dataset, real-time insert
Seek after sortInfinite scroll

basic.title: Basic / Conceptual
items: Frontend ও Backend-এর পার্থক্য কী?
Frontend - user যা browser-এ দেখে আর interact করে (HTML, CSS, JS, React)। Backend - server-side logic, DB, auth, API (Node, Python, Java)।
Full-stack developer মানে?
Frontend আর backend দুটোই করতে পারে। Monolith-এ end-to-end feature ship করতে পারে, micro-service context-এ frontend + BFF + service।
MVC কী?
Model-View-Controller - application-কে তিন layer-এ ভাগ। Model = data + rules, View = UI, Controller = request handle, Model update, View choose।
API কী?
Application Programming Interface - দুই software-এর communication contract। Web-এ REST/GraphQL/gRPC-এ HTTP-এর উপর চলে।
REST ও GraphQL-এর পার্থক্য?
REST - resource-based, multiple endpoints, fixed shape। GraphQL - single endpoint, query-time শুধু যতটুকু দরকার তাই। Over/under-fetch REST-এ বেশি।
Git-এ branch কী?
Parallel line of development। git checkout -b feat/x দিয়ে বানান, merge/rebase দিয়ে main-এ আনুন।
Frontend framework কেন দরকার (vanilla JS থাকতে)?
Reactive UI, component reusability, state management, routing, build tooling - প্রতিটা hand-roll করা 10K-line app-এ অসম্ভব।
CI/CD কী?
Continuous Integration - প্রতি commit-এ test/build auto চলে। Continuous Deployment - pass হলে auto deploy। GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins।
Semantic versioning?
MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH। Breaking change → major, new feature → minor, bugfix → patch। npm package-এ standard।
Monolith vs Microservices?
Monolith - একটা codebase, এক deploy। Simple শুরুর জন্য। Microservices - ছোট independent service। Team scale-এ ভালো, complexity বেশি।
TDD কী?
Test-Driven Development: red → green → refactor। আগে failing test লিখুন, তারপর minimum code দিয়ে pass, তারপর refactor।
Agile কী?
Iterative, incremental software development। Scrum/Kanban প্রয়োগ। Short sprint, regular demo, feedback-driven।
Static vs Dynamic typing?
Static - compile time type check (TypeScript, Java)। Dynamic - runtime-এ type resolve (JS, Python)। Static-এ tooling + safety ভালো।
Docker কী?
Containerization tool - app + dependency একসাথে package। "Works on my machine" problem solve।
Cache কী ও levels?
Frequently accessed data fast storage-এ রাখা। Levels: browser cache, CDN, reverse proxy (Nginx), application cache (Redis), DB query cache।
Frontend performance metric?
Core Web Vitals: LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) ≤ 2.5s, FID/INP (input delay) ≤ 100ms/200ms, CLS (layout shift) ≤ 0.1। Lighthouse-এ measure।
Accessibility (a11y) কেন?
সব user (screen reader, keyboard-only, low-vision) পারবেন - ethical, legal (ADA/WCAG), SEO-ও boost।
Authentication vs Authorization?
Authentication - you are who? (login)। Authorization - you can do what? (permission)।
OWASP Top 10 কী?
Web app-এর top security risks: Broken Access Control, Crypto failures, Injection, Insecure Design, Misconfig, Vulnerable components, Auth failures, Software/data integrity, Logging failures, SSRF।
Clean code principles?
Meaningful names, small function, single-purpose, no duplication (DRY), prefer composition, write tests, comment why not what।
Observability - logs, metrics, traces-এর পার্থক্য?

Logs: discrete event ("user 123 logged in")। Metrics: aggregated numbers (request_count, p99_latency)। Traces: request জুড়ে span tree across services। Production-এ তিনটাই correlation-id দিয়ে tie করা critical।
Feature flag / flag-driven development কী?
Code deploy আর feature release decouple। if (flag.enabled('new-ui')) ... runtime toggle। Canary rollout (5%→25%→100%), A/B test, kill switch। LaunchDarkly, GrowthBook, Unleash, self-hosted DB flag।
Web Worker ও Service Worker-এর পার্থক্য?
Web Worker: main thread-এর পাশে parallel JS - CPU-heavy কাজ। Service Worker: network proxy (offline, cache, push notification, background sync)। PWA-এর foundation।
Monorepo benefits + trade-offs?

Benefits: atomic cross-project refactor, shared tooling, code discovery। Tools: Turborepo, Nx, Bazel, pnpm workspaces। Trade-offs: CI complexity, unrelated rebuild, access control harder। Small team এ sometimes overkill।
Error handling - error vs exception vs Result type?

JS-এ throw exception flow। Modern pattern: Result/Either type ({ ok: true, value } | { ok: false, error }) - typed error, no hidden control flow। Node crash-এ unhandledRejection/uncaughtException process-wide listener + graceful shutdown।
Technical debt - কীভাবে justify refactor?

Quantify impact: bug rate, deploy time, onboarding friction, feature velocity। "Boy Scout rule" (touching code leave it cleaner) + dedicated 10-20% sprint capacity। Rewrite-এর বদলে strangler-fig (piece-by-piece replace)।

frontend.title: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
items: Semantic HTML কেন?
Accessibility (screen reader বোঝে), SEO, maintainability। <article>, <nav>, <section> ইত্যাদি ব্যবহার করুন।
CSS specificity কীভাবে work করে?
inline > id > class/attribute/pseudo-class > element/pseudo-element। !important override করে কিন্তু avoid করুন।
Box model?
content + padding + border + margin। box-sizing: border-box দিলে width-এ padding+border include।
Flexbox-এর main axis কী?
flex-direction দ্বারা নির্ধারিত। row-এ horizontal, column-এ vertical। justify-content main axis, align-items cross axis।
Grid vs Flex কখন?
Flex - 1-D layout (row বা column)। Grid - 2-D (row + column একসাথে)। Layout = Grid, components inside = Flex।
position: absolute কী করে?
Nearest positioned ancestor-এর relative-এ position হয়। Parent-এ position: relative না থাকলে viewport-এর relative।
em vs rem?
em - parent font-size-এর relative। rem - root (html) font-size-এর relative। Consistent scaling-এর জন্য rem preferred।
closure কী?
Function যে নিজের lexical scope-এর variable mind করে outer context-এর বাইরেও। React hook-এ stale closure common bug।
Event delegation?
Individual child-এ listener না লাগিয়ে parent-এ একটা listener, event.target দিয়ে নির্দিষ্ট করা। Dynamic list-এ efficient।
Promise chain vs async/await?
Functionally same। async/await readable, try/catch দিয়ে error handle সহজ। Parallel-এ Promise.all লাগে।
Promise.all vs allSettled vs race?
all - সব fulfill বা একটা reject। allSettled - সবগুলো settle, reject-এও continue। race - প্রথম settle।
Debounce কীভাবে লিখবেন?

function debounce(fn, ms) {
  let t;
  return (...a) => {
    clearTimeout(t);
    t = setTimeout(() => fn(...a), ms);
  };
}
CSS custom property কী?
--color: red; - runtime-এ JS দিয়ে change করা যায়। Sass variable build-time, CSS custom property dynamic।
display: none vs visibility: hidden vs opacity: 0?
none - DOM-এ থাকে, render tree-তে নেই, space নেয় না। hidden - space নেয়, invisible। opacity: 0 - space নেয়, invisible, কিন্তু interact করা যায়।
Array.map vs forEach?
map - নতুন array return। forEach - undefined, side effect-এর জন্য।
CSS Container Query কী এবং media query-এর চেয়ে কীভাবে আলাদা?

Media query viewport size-এর উপর ভিত্তি, container query parent container size-এর উপর। Component reusable - where embedded তার উপর style adapt। container-type: inline-size + @container (min-width: 400px) { ... }। 2023+-এ widespread support।
CSS Logical Properties কেন দরকার?
RTL/LTR/vertical text support। margin-inline-start vs margin-left - writing direction-অনুযায়ী automatic। Arabic/Hebrew site-এ mandatory।
Intl.Collator, Intl.NumberFormat, Intl.DateTimeFormat - কেন use?
Locale-aware sort/format। Bengali-তে "আ" সঠিক position-এ sort, Arabic digit (٠١٢٣) display, locale-specific date format ("১৫ এপ্রিল" vs "15 Apr")। Polyfill-এর প্রয়োজন নেই - built-in।
WeakMap / WeakSet vs Map / Set কখন?

Weak reference - GC collect করতে পারে key object (no strong ref)। Use case: DOM node → metadata mapping (node unmount হলে auto cleanup), private field polyfill। Iterate করা যায় না - memory leak prevent এই-ই purpose।
Structured cloning vs JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x))?

structuredClone() browser-native deep clone - Date/Map/Set/ArrayBuffer/circular ref handle করে। JSON stringify function/Symbol/Date drop করে, circular-এ error। Clone lib-এর দরকার নেই modern browser-এ।
Intersection Observer-এর real-world use?

Lazy-load image (loading="lazy" native, বা custom), infinite scroll trigger, analytics (element viewport-এ কতক্ষণ), scroll-linked animation। scroll listener-এর চেয়ে performant - async, off-main-thread।

typescript.title: TypeScript
items: TypeScript কেন শিখব - plain JS-এ compile-time safety কীভাবে value add করে?
Refactor safety (rename propagate), IntelliSense, API contract documentation, catch null/undefined bugs ahead-of-runtime। Team size বাড়লে ROI exponential।
type vs interface - কোনটা কখন?

Interface: object shape, declaration merging (ambient typings extend), class implements। Type: union/intersection/tuple/primitive alias, mapped/conditional types। Object shape-এ interchangeable - convention team choice।
Generic constraint কী ও কখন লাগে?
<T extends U> - T যেন U-এর property access/shape guarantee করে। Example: function sort<T extends { compare: ... }>(arr: T[])।
Conditional type-এ distributivity মানে কী?
T extends U ? X : Y naked type param-এ union-এর উপর distribute হয় - Exclude<'a'|'b', 'a'> = Exclude<'a','a'> | Exclude<'b','a'> = 'b'। এড়াতে [T] extends [U]।
infer কীভাবে কাজ করে?
Conditional-এর extends clause-এ নতুন type variable bind করে pattern match। T extends (...a: infer P) => infer R ? ... : ... - Parameters/ReturnType-এর backbone।
never type কোথায় ব্যবহার হয়?
Exhaustive check (switch default-এ assertNever), function-এ always throw/infinite loop, filter-out-এ (Exclude), impossible intersection (string & number)।
unknown vs any - team-এ কোনটা promote?
Always prefer unknown। any disables type check; unknown forces narrow before use (typeof/instanceof/zod parse)। noImplicitAny + unknown-first policy।
Declaration merging কী?
Same-named interface/namespace multiple declaration auto-merge - library ambient extend করার main mechanism। type-এ merge হয় না।
satisfies operator কবে এসেছে, কী problem solve করে?
TS 4.9-এ। as narrow করে কিন্তু safety নেই; explicit annotation literal widen করে। satisfies type constraint enforce + literal types preserve - config object-এ গেম চেঞ্জার।
Type-level programming-এর real-world use?

tRPC (server routes → client types), Prisma (schema → model types), zod (runtime schema → TS type), react-hook-form (field path autocomplete), Drizzle ORM (query builder typed result), ts-pattern (exhaustive match)।
Variance - covariance/contravariance TS-এ কোথায় matter?
Function parameter contravariant (method shorthand historically bivariant)। Array covariant (Dog[] → Animal[])। Readonly array safer। strictFunctionTypes flag strict variance enforce।
Branded type কীভাবে implement + কেন?
type UserId = string & { __brand: 'UserId' } + factory function। Structural typing-এ accidental mix (UserId vs OrderId both string) prevent। ID, currency, sanitized HTML-এ ব্যবহার।
Utility type-এর চিট শীট (top 8)?
Partial/Required, Readonly/Mutable, Pick/Omit, Record<K, V>, Exclude/Extract, NonNullable, ReturnType/Parameters, Awaited, InstanceType। Type manipulation-এর Lego blocks।
Module augmentation কী ও কোথায় দরকার?
declare module 'pkg' { ... } - third-party module-এ type add/override। Example: Express Request-এ user property যোগ করতে declaration merge।
tsconfig-এ কোন strictness flag-গুলো critical?

strict: true (covers strictNullChecks, strictFunctionTypes, strictBindCallApply, strictPropertyInitialization, noImplicitAny, noImplicitThis, alwaysStrict)। Extra: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes।

react.title: React
items: JSX কী?
JavaScript-এ XML-like syntax। Babel/TSC React.createElement call-এ convert করে। শুধু syntactic sugar।
Why keys in lists?
React reconciliation-এ child identity track করতে। Stable unique key না দিলে state/DOM ভুলভাবে associate হয়।
useState batch করে কি?
React 18+-এ সব update (event handler, promise, timeout) automatically batched। পুরনো React-এ শুধু event handler-এ।
useEffect কখন চলে?
Render commit-এর পর। Dependency array empty হলে শুধু mount-এ, [x] হলে x change-এ, missing হলে প্রতি render-এ।
Cleanup function কেন?
Next effect চালানোর আগে বা unmount-এ। Subscription, timer, listener cleanup না করলে memory leak।
Controlled vs Uncontrolled?
Controlled - input value state থেকে আসে (value + onChange)। Uncontrolled - DOM-এর নিজের value, ref দিয়ে read।
React.memo কী?
Functional component-এর HOC - props shallow equal হলে skip render। Callback props স্থির রাখতে useCallback দরকার।
useMemo ও useCallback-এর পার্থক্য?
useMemo(fn, deps) → fn-এর return value memoize। useCallback(fn, deps) → fn reference memoize। useCallback(f, d) === useMemo(() => f, d)।
Context কখন avoid?
High-frequency update (mouse position)-এ সব consumer re-render করে। State management library বা selector pattern use করুন।
useReducer কখন useState-এর চেয়ে ভালো?
Complex state (multiple fields, transitions), next state পূর্বের state-এর উপর depend, একাধিক action type।
Ref কখন use করবেন?
DOM node access, persistent mutable value (re-render না করেই), timer id, previous value store।
Server component কী?
React 19+ feature। Server-এ render, HTML stream হয়, no JS ship, direct DB call। Client interaction-এর জন্য 'use client'।
Error boundary কীভাবে কাজ করে?
Class component-এর getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch। Render-time error catch করে fallback দেখায়। Event handler-এর error catch করে না।
Suspense কী?
Child তৈরি না হওয়া পর্যন্ত fallback দেখায়। Lazy loading + data fetching (React 19 actions + promises)-এ use।
Hydration কী?
Server-rendered HTML-এর উপর client JS attach করে interactive বানানো। Server+client output mismatch হলে hydration mismatch error।
React 19 use() hook কী করে?
Promise বা Context conditionally consume। const data = use(promise) - Suspense boundary নিয়ে promise resolve পর্যন্ত wait। Conditional-এও call করা যায় (hooks rule-এর exception!)।
useOptimistic কখন use?
React 19। Mutation pending-এ UI-তে guessed state দেখান, server confirm-এ actual state ফেরে। Like button, comment add - instant feel দেয়। Built-in rollback on error।
React Server Actions কী?
'use server' directive-যুক্ত async function। Client থেকে form action-এ directly call, framework network + serialize handle করে। Traditional API route-এর আলাদা boilerplate নেই।
Client Component vs Server Component boundary rules?

Server Component (default App Router-এ) - no state, no effect, direct DB access OK, JS ship হয় না। 'use client' boundary-তে hooks + interactivity allowed। Server component serializable prop দিয়ে client component-এ pass করতে পারে।
Streaming SSR with Suspense কীভাবে কাজ?
Server HTML stream করে part-by-part। Slow data <Suspense fallback>-এ wrap - fallback আগে HTML-এ flush, data ready হলে browser-এ replaced। FCP দ্রুত, progressive interactivity।
useActionState (ex-useFormState) কী?
React 19। Form action-এর pending/error/result state manage - Redux reducer-এর form-variant। useFormStatus-এর সাথে pending UI easy।

reactivity.title: Reactivity & Performance
items: VDOM কেন?
Real DOM slow। VDOM JS object (fast), diff করে only necessary DOM operation করে। Trade-off: memory + diff cost।
React fiber কী?
React-এর reconciliation engine, rewrite React 16-এ। Work-unit-এ split, interruptible, priority-aware।
Concurrent mode কী?
Render interrupt করে urgent update আগে process। useTransition, useDeferredValue এর API।
Signal vs React state?

Signal fine-grained - শুধু DOM node update। React state default-এ component re-run। তবে React-এ useSyncExternalStore + signal library (@preact/signals-react, Legend State, TanStack Store) দিয়ে same FGR achieve করা যায়।
Immutable update কেন?
React (===) রেফারেন্স compare করে change detect। arr.push() করলে reference একই, re-render হবে না।
Virtualization কখন লাগে?
DOM-এ 1K+ heavy item, scroll laggy। Fixed/variable size row-এ react-window, react-virtual।
Web worker কী?
Main thread-এর বাইরে parallel JS run। Heavy CPU task (parsing, image) UI block ছাড়াই।
requestAnimationFrame vs setTimeout?
rAF - next repaint-এর আগে, browser-synchronized। Animation-এ smooth।
Layout thrashing?
Read → Write → Read → Write interleave করলে প্রতি read-এ forced reflow। Batch: সব read আগে, সব write পরে।
Tree shaking?
Bundler dead code remove করে। ES module-এর static analysis-এ সম্ভব; CJS-এ না।
Tearing কী এবং React 18-এ কীভাবে solved?

Concurrent render-এ পুরো tree render দুইবার split হতে পারে; external store mutate হলে first half এ old value, second half-এ new - inconsistent render। useSyncExternalStore snapshot-based API দিয়ে guarantee করে tear-free।
Fine-Grained Reactivity (FGR) React-এ achievable?

হ্যাঁ - useSyncExternalStore official API + signal library (@preact/signals-react, @legendapp/state, @tanstack/store)। SolidJS/Svelte-এর built-in, React-এ opt-in - কিন্তু same granularity + concurrent-safe।
Batching React 18-এ কী পরিবর্তন এনেছে?
Pre-18: event handler-এ batched, promise/timeout-এ না। 18: automatic batching everywhere - promise, setTimeout, native event সব batched। flushSync দিয়ে opt-out।
useTransition-এর practical example?
Large list filter input-এ। Transition-এ wrap করলে typing smooth (urgent), list update deprioritized। isPending দিয়ে subtle loading indicator। Without: jank during heavy render।
React Compiler (RC) vs manual memo?
Compile-time auto memoization - useMemo/useCallback/React.memo manual কমায়। Framework-এ opt-in (Next.js, Vite plugin)। 2026-এ production-ready।
Scheduler + priority - কেন দরকার?
All renders সমান নয়। Input response (keystroke) high-priority, list re-render low। React scheduler time-slicing-এ 5ms-এর মধ্যে main thread-কে return - user interaction responsive থাকে।

backend.title: Node & HTTP Server
items: Node.js single-threaded কেন fast?
Non-blocking I/O + event loop। CPU-bound নয়, I/O-bound workload-এ excel করে। CPU heavy → worker threads বা cluster।
Event loop phase?
timers → pending callbacks → idle/prepare → poll → check (setImmediate) → close। প্রতি phase-এর মাঝে microtask flush।
process.nextTick vs setImmediate?
nextTick - current operation-এর পরেই, microtask queue। setImmediate - check phase, next iteration।
Stream কী?
Data chunk-wise process। Readable, Writable, Duplex, Transform। বড় file/HTTP body memory-friendly।
Buffer কী?
Binary data raw representation। Node-এ Buffer.from। Browser-এ ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array analog।
Cluster module কী?
Parent process multiple worker fork করে multi-core ব্যবহার করে। PM2 এর উপর build।
HTTP keep-alive?
একই TCP connection-এ multiple request। TCP handshake cost কমায়। Default enabled HTTP/1.1-এ।
REST-এর stateless মানে?
প্রতিটা request self-contained। Server previous request-এর কোনো state মনে রাখে না। Scaling সহজ।
JSON Web Token (JWT)?
Signed token (header.payload.signature)। Stateless auth - server decode করলেই user-info পায়। Revocation কঠিন।
Bun.serve কেন Express-এর চেয়ে ভালো?
Native fast (3–4× throughput), routing built-in, WebSocket/HTTPS built-in, no middleware indirection।
ESM vs CJS?
ESM (import/export) - static, async, tree-shakable, modern standard। CJS (require/module.exports) - dynamic, sync, Node legacy।
Memory leak signs?
Increasing RSS over time, slow GC pause, heap snapshot-এ retained growing set। Common: uncleared timer, listener, global cache।
Stream backpressure কী ও কীভাবে handle?
Producer consumer-এর চেয়ে দ্রুত data push করলে buffer overflow। pipeline()/pipe automatic backpressure handle করে - writable.write() false return করলে pause, drain event-এ resume।
worker_threads কখন appropriate?
CPU-bound task (PDF gen, image processing, crypto)। I/O-bound-এ overhead বেশি, just use async। Shared memory SharedArrayBuffer দিয়ে pass - no copy overhead।
AbortController + AbortSignal Node-এ কেন?
Cancellable async operation (fetch, setTimeout, readable stream)। Timeout + user cancel unified API। AbortSignal.timeout(5000), AbortSignal.any([s1, s2]) - Node 20+।
Graceful shutdown checklist?

1) SIGTERM listener। 2) HTTP server close() - new connection block, in-flight finish। 3) Queue worker drain। 4) DB pool end()। 5) Hard-kill timeout (30s) fallback। K8s preStop + terminationGracePeriod-এর সাথে align।
Node.js debug tooling - production safe?
--inspect=0.0.0.0:9229 production-এ dangerous (RCE)। Use --cpu-prof/--heap-prof snapshot পরে analyze, বা Clinic.js/0x. APM (Datadog, New Relic, Sentry Performance) continuous trace।
Event loop lag monitor কীভাবে?
perf_hooks.monitorEventLoopDelay() - p50/p99 expose। Threshold cross-এ alert - blocking sync code বা heavy GC detect। Popular libs: event-loop-lag, prom-client integration।

express.title: Express & OOP APIs
items: Middleware কী?
(req, res, next) - request flow-এর মাঝে logic। Auth, logging, body parsing, error handling।
app.use-এর order matter?
হ্যাঁ। Top-down declare order-এ execute। CORS middleware routes-এর আগে, error middleware সব শেষে।
Error middleware 4 args কেন?
Express signature-এ 4 params দেখে error middleware হিসেবে identify করে। সাধারণ middleware 3 params।
Async route-এ error?
Default Express 4-এ async error catch হয় না; next(err) call করুন বা express-async-errors package, বা Express 5-এ auto।
Helmet কী?
Security header set করে - X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS, CSP ইত্যাদি। সহজে production security baseline।
Rate limiting কেন?
Brute-force, DoS, abuse রোধ। express-rate-limit IP-based window।
Session vs JWT?
Session - server-side storage, cookie-এ session ID। Revoke সহজ। JWT - stateless, cross-service, কিন্তু revoke কঠিন।
Dependency Injection Express-এ?
Manual: controller class constructor-এ service pass। Container-based: awilix, tsyringe। NestJS-এ built-in।
Repository pattern কেন?
Data access encapsulate, service শুধু interface জানে। ORM থেকে raw SQL-এ swap সহজ, test-এ mock।
Controller-Service-Repository-এর logic division?
Controller - HTTP in/out। Service - business rule। Repository - DB access।
Zod/Joi দিয়ে request validation - কীভাবে integrate?

Middleware: const validate = (schema) => (req, res, next) => { const r = schema.safeParse(req.body); if (!r.success) return res.status(422).json(r.error); req.body = r.data; next(); }। TS-এ z.infer<typeof schema> দিয়ে type auto।
OpenAPI / Swagger - Express-এ generate?
Route + schema থেকে auto-spec - swagger-jsdoc + comments, zod-to-openapi Zod schema থেকে। Typed RPC চাইলে Express এড়িয়ে tRPC/Hono + ts-rest/TypeSpec। Client SDK auto-generate possible।
Multer / file upload - security concerns?
File size limit (limits.fileSize), mime-type whitelist, disk storage outside web root, virus scan (ClamAV), filename sanitize (path traversal), S3-এ stream-upload কে preferable।
Server-Sent Events (SSE) vs WebSocket?
SSE: HTTP-based, one-way server → client, auto-reconnect, simple। WebSocket: full-duplex, binary, more overhead। Log stream, notification feed-এ SSE enough। Chat/game → WebSocket।
API versioning strategies?

URL (/v1/users) - most common, explicit। Header (Accept: application/vnd.app.v2+json) - RESTful purist। Query (?version=2) - simple। Version mostly breaking change-এ; minor evolution backwards-compatible field add।
Error response format best practice?

Problem Details RFC 7807: { type, title, status, detail, instance }। Consistent across endpoints, machine + human readable। Include trace/correlation ID for debugging; sensitive stack trace production-এ hide।

oopsolid.title: OOP & SOLID
items: OOP-এর 4 pillar?
Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstraction।
Composition over inheritance কেন?
Inheritance tight coupling, deep hierarchy fragile। Composition flexible - runtime-এ swap।
Interface vs Abstract class?
Interface - contract only, multiple implement। Abstract class - partial implementation, single inheritance।
SRP-এর easy test?
"What reasons could cause this class to change?" - ১টার বেশি হলে violation।
OCP-এর pattern?
Strategy, Template Method, Plugin architecture। Core unchanged, behavior via polymorphism/config।
LSP violation classic example?
Square extends Rectangle। Rectangle-এর setWidth/setHeight independent, Square-এ সেই invariant ভাঙে।
ISP-এর benefit?
Client unused method-এর উপর depend না করে। Interface change-এ blast radius কম।
DIP ও DI-এর সম্পর্ক?
DIP = principle (depend on abstraction)। DI = implementation technique (constructor-এ pass বা IoC container)।
YAGNI এবং SOLID conflict?
Over-abstract করলে YAGNI ভাঙে। SOLID apply তখন যখন concrete change দেখছেন, speculative নয়।
SOLID ও functional programming?
FP-তেও apply - module কে single-purpose, higher-order function-এ open/closed, interface-এর বদলে type signature।
Domain-Driven Design (DDD) কী এবং কখন apply?

Business domain code structure-এ reflect। Core concepts: Bounded Context, Ubiquitous Language, Entity/Value Object/Aggregate। Complex business logic + non-trivial scope-এ। Simple CRUD-এ over-engineering।
Hexagonal / Ports & Adapters architecture?

Business core (domain/use-cases) + peripheral adapters (DB, HTTP, queue)। Port = interface domain defines, Adapter = concrete impl। Domain framework-independent। Test-এ fake adapter, prod-এ real - swap easy।
Clean Architecture-এর dependency rule?
Inner layer (entity, use-case) outer layer (DB, framework) জানে না - dependency outside → inside একদিকেই। Framework swap-এ domain untouched। Robert Martin-এর variation।
Anti-Corruption Layer (ACL) কী?
Legacy/external system integrate করার সময় translation layer - external model domain model-এ pollute না করে। Change isolate - third-party API redesign-এ শুধু ACL update।
Anemic Domain Model - anti-pattern?
Domain object শুধু data holder, logic service-এ - procedural disguised as OOP। Rich Domain Model-এ behavior data-এর কাছে থাকে (Tell Don't Ask)। Business-heavy app-এ rich model maintainable।
Entity vs Value Object?
Entity: identity (ID) দিয়ে track, mutable - User, Order। Value Object: immutable, equality value-based - Money, Address, DateRange। new Money(100, 'USD') equal যদি amount+currency same।

patterns.title: Design Patterns
items: Singleton সমস্যা কী?
Global state, testing hard, tight coupling, concurrency issue (multi-thread)। DI container preferred।
Factory pattern কখন?
Object creation logic complex, concrete class runtime-এ decide, subclass-এ variation।
Builder কখন?
Many optional config, step-by-step construction। Java-এ Lombok @Builder।
Observer কোথায়?
DOM event, Node EventEmitter, RxJS, Redux subscribe। Pub-sub architecture-এর base।
Strategy pattern example?
Sorting algorithm, payment method, authentication provider - runtime-এ swap।
Decorator ও Adapter-এর পার্থক্য?
Decorator - same interface, add behavior। Adapter - incompatible interface-কে compatible করা।
Facade কী?
Complex subsystem-এর সামনে simple interface। jQuery = DOM-এর facade। Service layer = repository-দের facade।
MVC vs MVVM vs MVP?
সব presentation separation, কিন্তু binding strategy আলাদা। MVVM - two-way binding (Vue/Angular)। MVP - Presenter mediator। MVC - Controller orchestrates।
Repository vs Data Mapper?
Repository - collection-like interface (findById, save)। Data Mapper - object ↔ DB mapping। Repo usually Mapper-এর উপরে।
Module pattern JS-এ?
IIFE দিয়ে private scope তৈরি, select member expose। ES module এখন native।
CQRS (Command Query Responsibility Segregation)?
Write model (command) আর read model (query) আলাদা structure। Read-optimized denormalized view, write normalized। Complex domain + read-heavy system-এ benefit। Event sourcing-এর frequent companion।
Event Sourcing কী এবং benefit কী?

Current state সরাসরি store না করে, state-change-করা সব events append-only log-এ store। Current state = event replay। Benefits: full audit trail, time-travel debugging, rebuild any projection। Trade-off: complexity, query via projection।
Mediator pattern - কোথায় ব্যবহার?
Multiple object direct communicate না করে central mediator দিয়ে। Example: Chat room (users ↔ room ↔ users), form field cross-validation (field ↔ form ↔ field)। MediatR (.NET)।
Visitor pattern কখন?
Tree/object structure-এ নতুন operation add করতে হয়, existing class modify না করে। AST traversal (Babel plugin, ESLint rule), report generation। Structure stable but operations বদলায় - use case।
Flyweight pattern?
Many similar object-এর shared state extract করে memory save। Text editor-এ character object - font/size flyweight pool-এ। JavaScript-এ string interning engine-level।
Unit of Work pattern কী?

Business transaction-এ multiple repository change track করে atomic commit। Entity state (new/modified/deleted) collect, single commit()-এ DB transaction-এ persist। ORM-এ built-in (EF, Hibernate Session)।

database.title: Database
items: SQL vs NoSQL কখন?
SQL - structured, relational, ACID, join। NoSQL - flexible schema, horizontal scale, specific access pattern (KV, document, graph)।
Index কখন add করবেন?
Frequently WHERE/JOIN/ORDER BY column-এ। Write overhead বাড়ে, তাই প্রয়োজন মতো।
Index drawback?
Insert/update/delete slow (index update)। Disk space বেশি। Write-heavy table-এ over-index করা যাবে না।
N+1 কীভাবে detect?
ORM debug/log, query count monitor। APM (Datadog, New Relic)-এ trace দেখলে ধরা পড়ে।
Transaction isolation - Repeatable Read কী prevent?
Dirty read + non-repeatable read। Phantom read প্রতিরোধ হয় না (সব DB-তে না)।
Deadlock কী?
দুই transaction পরস্পরের lock-এর জন্য wait, cycle। DB detect করে একজনকে rollback করে। Cause: inconsistent lock order।
Optimistic vs Pessimistic locking?
Optimistic - version column, commit-এ check। Low contention। Pessimistic - SELECT FOR UPDATE, immediate lock। High contention।
Connection pool কেন?
TCP handshake + auth per query expensive। Pool-এ reusable connection, concurrent limit।
Denormalization কখন?
Read-heavy, join slow হচ্ছে। Reporting, analytics, cached aggregate।
Window function কী?
Row-wise aggregate without GROUP BY collapse। ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), SUM() OVER (PARTITION BY ...)।
MVCC (Multi-Version Concurrency Control) কী?

Read ও write lock ছাড়াই concurrent - প্রতিটা transaction-এর নিজের snapshot। PostgreSQL, MySQL InnoDB use করে। Side effect: dead tuple build-up → VACUUM/autovacuum জরুরি। Read কখনো write block করে না।
WAL (Write-Ahead Log) কী এবং কেন?
Data file change-এর আগে change log-এ write - crash-এ replay-able। Durability guarantee + replication foundation। PostgreSQL logical replication, point-in-time restore সব এর উপর।
Materialized View কখন এবং কীভাবে?
Complex query pre-compute + store। Read instant, write-এ stale। REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY periodically বা trigger-based। Reporting dashboard-এ heavily use।
CTE (Common Table Expression) vs subquery?
WITH x AS (SELECT ...)। Readability + recursion (WITH RECURSIVE) - org chart, tree traversal। PostgreSQL 12+ CTE inline করে - subquery-এর পার্থক্য performance-এ negligible এখন।
Postgres JSON vs JSONB column?
JSON: text-এ store, parse per query - history preserve (ordering, whitespace)। JSONB: binary decomposed, index-able (GIN), fast query। API log-এ JSON, queryable data-এ JSONB।
Full-text search - Postgres native vs dedicated engine?

Postgres tsvector/tsquery + GIN index - medium scale + single-DB simplicity-এ enough। Elasticsearch/Meilisearch/Typesense fuzzy, faceted, relevance scoring advanced, separate infra। Hybrid (Postgres + pgvector + pgroonga) 2026-এ popular।
Geospatial queries - Postgres PostGIS?
GEOMETRY/GEOGRAPHY type + GIST index। "Nearby users", polygon contains, distance calc। Redis-এরও GEOADD/GEOSEARCH আছে simple use case-এ।
Change Data Capture (CDC) কী এবং use case?
DB-এর row-level change stream - replicate/sync-এ। Tools: Debezium (Kafka-ভিত্তিক), Postgres logical replication। Use: search index sync, event-driven microservice, data warehouse ETL, audit log।

frameworks.title: Backend Frameworks
items: 2026-এ greenfield TS backend - Express বাছাই কেন wrong?

Express type safety নেই, performance 1x baseline, no batteries included। Alternatives TS-first + 3-9x faster: Hono (edge), Elysia (Bun, 6x), Encore.ts (9x + infra), Fastify (Node, 2-3x + schema)। Express শুধু legacy migration বা huge npm plugin need-এ।
Hono-এর portability USP কোথায়?

Web Standards API (Request/Response) core - Cloudflare Workers, Deno, Bun, Node, Netlify, Supabase Edge সব-এ একই code। Lock-in নেই - runtime switch করলেও app untouched। Edge-first design - small bundle, fast cold start।
Elysia - কেন Bun-exclusive এবং performance কেমন?

Static code analysis + Bun-specific optimization (JavaScriptCore quirks, native bindings)। Exact Mirror JIT data normalization ~30x faster medium payload-এ। TypeBox schema compile-time-এ parser/serializer generate। Elysia-এর Nov 2025 benchmark (Intel i7-13700K): 294K req/s plain, 224K with validation। Trade-off: Bun runtime lock।
Encore.ts - "infrastructure framework" মানে কী?

API + DB + Pub/Sub + cron + tracing - সব code-এ declare, framework cloud infra provision করে (your own AWS/GCP)। Manual Terraform/CDK-এর দরকার নেই। Auto distributed tracing, metrics, dashboard। Rust runtime under hood (JS interface)। Performance 139K req/s plain, 96K w/validation (same Nov 2025 hardware) - Elysia-এর প্রায় অর্ধেক, তবে Rust-backed robustness + infra included বড় value।
Framework benchmark numbers - trustworthy?

Author-এর own benchmark critically evaluate করুন - methodology আর hardware transparency check। Example: Encore claimed 3x Elysia; Elysia-র Nov 2025 re-run (same box) দেখায় Elysia 2x Encore! Real-world DB latency (5-50ms) framework overhead (<1ms) swamp করে - perf gap app-এ প্রায় disappear। Framework choice শুধু perf না - DX, ecosystem, ops, runtime fit সব factor।
Fastify vs Hono - Node-এ কোনটা?

Fastify: Node-exclusive, mature plugin ecosystem (OAuth, JWT, WebSocket, GraphQL প্রচুর), schema-based। Hono: portable Web Standards, smaller, edge-ready। Node-only + plugin-heavy → Fastify। Multi-runtime / edge + Node → Hono।
NestJS 2026-এ still relevant?

Enterprise team-এ yes - Angular/Spring-ভিত্তিক developer onboarding easy, DI + decorator + module system mature। Small team / greenfield startup-এ overkill - Hono/Elysia-এর speed + simplicity better fit।
tRPC vs REST vs GraphQL - 2026 choice?

tRPC: same-repo monorepo full-stack TS - server types = client types (no codegen)। GraphQL: multi-client (web + mobile + third-party), flexible queries, Apollo/urql ecosystem। REST: widest tool support, public API, caching-friendly। Full-stack TS team + private API → tRPC-এর ergonomics unmatched।
Server Actions (React 19) vs tRPC vs REST API?

Server Actions: Next.js/TanStack Start-এ tightly coupled, form-centric, simplest। tRPC: framework-agnostic, multiple frontend clients, mature middleware। REST: open standard, best for third-party। Same-team same-framework monorepo → Server Actions। Multi-client / reusable → tRPC।
Migration Express → Hono - complexity?

Middleware signature rewrite ((c, next) instead of (req, res, next)), Request/Response use, response return (c.json) instead of res.send. Routing pattern similar। Plugin (auth, cors, rate-limit) built-in replacement available। 2-5 days for medium app।
Framework-free (Bun.serve / Hono bare) - কখন?

Single-purpose endpoint, latency-critical (edge), small team ownership - full control valuable। Express-এর মতো ecosystem don't need। Note: Bun.serve-এ routing + middleware built-in modern 2026-এ - bare setup-ও production-ready।
Deploy target lock-in কীভাবে minimize?

Web Standards API (Hono)। Business logic framework-agnostic module-এ isolate (hexagonal architecture)। DB + queue driver abstract layer-এর পেছনে। Runtime swap (Node → Bun, Cloudflare → Deno) 1-2 week effort হওয়া উচিত, 6 months না।

runtimes.title: Runtimes & Deploy
items: Node.js, Bun, Deno - core architectural difference কী?

Node: V8 + libuv + C++। Bun: JavaScriptCore (WebKit) + Zig - fast startup + low memory, 2.7x Node throughput। Deno: V8 + Rust + secure-by-default permission। Node - ecosystem king, Bun - performance king, Deno - modern clean slate।
JavaScriptCore vs V8 - কেন matter করে?

JSC (Bun): fast startup (8-15ms), low memory - short-lived script, edge/Lambda ideal। V8 (Node/Deno/Chrome): mature JIT, long-running peak performance ভালো। Cold-start critical হলে JSC, sustained throughput V8।
Bun-এর standout built-ins কী?
Native Bun.serve() (HTTP + WS + HTTPS), Bun.sql (Postgres), Bun.redis, bun:sqlite, Bun.$ shell, bundler, test runner, .env auto-load। Express + dotenv + bcrypt + pg - সব Bun একাই provide করে।
Deno-এর security model - practical impact?

Secure by default - deno run script.ts no network/file/env access। --allow-net, --allow-read=/data explicit grant। Supply-chain attack (malicious npm) impact কমায় - leaked key exfil করতে পারবে না internet access ছাড়া।
Edge runtime (Cloudflare Workers, Netlify Edge, Supabase Edge) vs traditional server?

Edge: V8 isolate, <1ms cold start, globally distributed, কিন্তু limited Node API (no fs, child_process), 128MB memory, 10-30s CPU limit। Server: full Node, any library, stateful, slower cold start। Simple geo-routing/auth-এ edge, heavy compute server-এ।
Cloudflare Workers - regular Lambda-এর চেয়ে কেন faster?

V8 isolate container না - JS engine-এর মধ্যে lightweight sandbox। Process start overhead নেই, memory footprint kB-level। Lambda-এর container initialize (100ms-2s) vs Workers (<1ms)। Trade-off: limited runtime API।
Deno Deploy vs Cloudflare Workers - কোনটা কখন?

Workers: larger network (330+ cities), longest track record, best pricing for volume, bindings (R2, KV, D1, Durable Objects)। Deno Deploy: fewer regions (30+), Deno stdlib-এ better TS ergonomics, Deno KV (stronger consistency), easier Node-refugee migration। Ecosystem lock-in different।
Hybrid architecture - 2026 best practice কী?
Edge-এ auth + redirect + A/B split + header transform। Container/serverless-এ business logic + DB। Queue-এ async task। CDN-এ static asset। "One size fits all" deprecated - tier অনুযায়ী target।
Portability strategy - multi-runtime code কীভাবে?

Web Standards API ব্যবহার করুন: fetch, Request, Response, URL, crypto.subtle, Web Streams। Framework: Hono (5+ runtime native), Nitro (universal adapter)। Node-specific API (fs, http) এড়িয়ে চলুন যদি edge-target হয়।
npm package Bun/Deno-তে কতটা compatible?

Bun: 95%+ npm compat, Node API implement করে gradually। Drop-in replacement মোটামুটি। Deno: npm: prefix দিয়ে import (npm:express), Deno 2-এ Node compat অনেক ভালো। Native addon (.node binary) issue - pure JS package বেশি smooth।
TypeScript support - runtime-specific কী পার্থক্য?
Deno/Bun: native, zero config, direct .ts run। Node 22+: --experimental-strip-types (type annotation erase, no check), production-এ still ts-node/tsx/swc-node বা build step লাগে।
JSR (JavaScript Registry) - npm-এর চেয়ে কী আলাদা?

Deno-backed modern registry। First-class TS (no @types), cross-runtime (Node, Deno, Bun), better security (provenance), score-based quality rating। Adoption এখনো npm-এর ধারে-কাছে নেই, কিন্তু Deno ecosystem-এ primary।

queues.title: Queues & Brokers
items: Queue কেন এবং কখন lightweight alternative sufficient?
Decouple + retry + scale। Low volume + same service same DB হলে Postgres SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED (pg-boss, graphile-worker) যথেষ্ট - আলাদা broker-এর overhead এড়ান।
At-most-once, at-least-once, exactly-once - real-world impact?
At-most-once: fire-and-forget metrics, lose OK। At-least-once: default choice + idempotent handler। Exactly-once: payment/ledger - Kafka transactions + unique constraint দিয়ে effective EO achieve।
Idempotency key কীভাবে implement?
(1) Client-generated UUID request-এ, (2) Server-এ Redis SETNX key: EX 24h, (3) first hit → process + cache result, (4) duplicate → return cached। Stripe-এর Idempotency-Key header pattern।
Outbox pattern কখন এবং কেন?

Distributed transaction-এর দরকার এড়াতে - DB write + message publish একই tx-এ নয়। Solution: same tx-এ outbox table-এ event insert। Background poller → queue publish। Kafka Connect, Debezium CDC-ভিত্তিক।
Saga pattern - choreography vs orchestration?

Choreography: services event consume করে next step trigger। Loose coupling, debug কঠিন। Orchestration: central coordinator (Temporal/Camunda) steps drive। Visible, restart easy, coupling তে orchestrator-এ। Long workflow orchestration preferred।
Priority queue - production-এ কীভাবে?
BullMQ-এ job priority (1-highest to N) sorted set score-এ। Starvation avoid: tier-wise dedicated worker pool (high/mid/low)। RabbitMQ priority queue max 10 levels। Kafka-তে priority lane আলাদা topic।
Backpressure handle - producer queue overflow করছে, what do?

1) Producer-এ token bucket rate limit। 2) Queue bounded + block/drop policy। 3) Worker horizontally scale। 4) Temporary spillover (SQS → S3 archive)। 5) Circuit breaker downstream-এ। Design-wise monitoring + alert key।
Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) handling workflow?

1) Max retry fail → DLQ move। 2) Alert (PagerDuty/Slack)। 3) Dashboard: count/trend/sample payload। 4) Ops investigate root cause। 5) Fix deploy। 6) DLQ → main queue replay (selective বা bulk)। Never silent drop।
Kafka partition key কিভাবে choose?

Key = ordering boundary। Same entity (user_id/order_id) same partition → sequential process। Key cardinality high → even distribution, low → hot partition। Partition count scale-time change করা painful - initially generous দিন।
Scheduled / cron job - durable + retry - কীভাবে?
OS cron trigger-এ scalability নেই। Production: Temporal / BullMQ repeat / AWS EventBridge Scheduler - durable state, missed execution catch-up, at-least-once + idempotent handler।
Consumer lag alarm - Kafka-তে কী action?

1) Consumer throughput কম কেন investigate (slow downstream, GC pause)। 2) Partition scale + consumer group size match। 3) Code profile - blocking call remove। 4) Retention hits এড়াতে temporary archive। Grafana/kafka-exporter metric essential।
BullMQ vs Temporal - কখন কোনটা?

BullMQ: short task, email send, image resize। Temporal: multi-step workflow days-long, human approval, compensating action। Workflow state code-এ express, Temporal durability provide করে - reinvent করতে হয় না।

scenario.title: Scenario-based
items: 10K rows table scroll laggy - fix?
1) DevTools-এ profile। 2) react-window/virtual দিয়ে virtualize। 3) Row component React.memo। 4) Expensive cell computation useMemo। 5) Event delegation। 6) CSS contain: strict।
Form প্রতি keystroke-এ পুরো page re-render - debug?
1) React DevTools Profiler। 2) Form state context-এ কি? Isolate। 3) Uncontrolled + ref। 4) Controlled হলে state-কে form component-এ colocate।
API intermittent 500 error - approach?
1) Log + APM check। 2) DB connection pool saturated? 3) Memory leak? 4) Downstream service timeout? 5) Retry + circuit breaker। 6) Correlation ID দিয়ে specific request trace।
Bundle size 5MB - কীভাবে কমাবেন?

1) vite build --analyze/webpack-bundle-analyzer। 2) Tree-shakable import। 3) Route-based code splitting। 4) Large dep replace (moment → date-fns)। 5) Dynamic import heavy feature। 6) Compression + CDN।
N+1 in production ORM - কীভাবে fix?
1) Query log-এ detect। 2) Eager load (include, select_related, JOIN)। 3) DataLoader batch। 4) Denormalized read model worst case।
New API version breaks old clients - strategy?
1) URL versioning (/v2/) বা header-এ। 2) Backward-compatible for deprecation period। 3) Deprecation header + sunset date। 4) Client usage metric আগে check।
Memory leak Node server - debug steps?
1) node --inspect + Chrome heap snapshot। 2) Take 2 snapshot, compare retained। 3) Usual suspects: timer not cleared, listener, global cache unbounded, closure over req।
Session stolen / CSRF - protection?
1) HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite cookie। 2) CSRF token। 3) Content Security Policy। 4) HTTPS everywhere। 5) Rotate session on privilege escalation।
Cache invalidation strategy?
TTL (safest), write-through (update source + cache), cache-aside (lazy), event-driven invalidation (pub-sub)। Write-heavy-এ TTL ভালো।
Monolith → microservices - kothay shuru?
1) Bounded context identify (DDD)। 2) Strangler fig pattern - edge থেকে piece-by-piece extract। 3) Shared DB anti-pattern, service-owned DB। 4) API gateway + event bus। 5) Observability day-1।
Zero-downtime DB migration - 50M row table-এ NOT NULL column add?

1) Column add nullable + default। 2) Backfill in batches (UPDATE ... WHERE id BETWEEN x AND y LIMIT 1000) - trigger not blocking। 3) App-এ double-write ensure future rows filled। 4) Data verified → constraint add। Single ALTER TABLE table lock - 50M row-এ hours।
Feature flag rollout - new checkout broke for 2% of users - action?

1) Kill switch flag off → instant rollback (no deploy)। 2) Error log + session replay investigate। 3) Reproduce locally। 4) Fix + test + canary 5% → monitor metrics → 25% → 100%। Flag config audit trail critical।
GDPR "Right to be forgotten" - distributed system-এ implement?

Challenge: user data multiple service + backup + analytics-এ। Strategy: 1) Soft delete → schedule hard delete 30 days। 2) Anonymize (replace PII with hash) in analytics। 3) Backup retention policy। 4) Event log redact। 5) Data flow map + deletion checklist।
Rate limit bypass - attacker rotating IP। Layered defense?

1) IP rate limit (first layer)। 2) Fingerprint (UA + accept-lang + screen)। 3) Per-account limit (authenticated)। 4) CAPTCHA on suspicious pattern। 5) WAF rules। 6) Honeypot route। 7) Behavioral anomaly detect - ML/heuristic।
Data backfill job - 100M rows, 7-day window - strategy?

1) Batched (10K chunks) - DB load manage। 2) Idempotent (re-run safe)। 3) Resume-able (checkpoint)। 4) Throttle (max concurrent + rate limit)। 5) Separate read replica ভালো। 6) Progress metric + ETA। 7) Circuit break on error spike। Job queue + worker fleet ideal।
P0 incident - payment processing down - runbook-এ 5 first steps?

1) Acknowledge - incident channel + status page "investigating"। 2) Rollback - recent deploy revert first (fastest mitigation)। 3) Isolate scope (which region/endpoint/%)। 4) Comms - stakeholders/customers honest update। 5) Bridge - war room, IC + scribe + SME roles। Post-incident: blameless postmortem 48-72hr within।

questions.explain: var function-scoped, hoisted (undefined)। let/const block-scoped, temporal dead zone। const reassignment নিষেধ (mutation নয়)।
0 == '' → true, 0 === '' → false। সবসময় === use, surprise কমে।

options: Inner function outer scope-এর variable remember করে
questions.explain: Closure inner function + outer scope-এর reference। React hook, module pattern, currying-এর base।
Historical JS bug - null-এর typeof 'object'। x === null দিয়ে check করুন।
NaN-এর একটাই rule - কোনো কিছুর সমান নয়, নিজের সমানও নয়। Number.isNaN() ব্যবহার করুন।

questions.q: Event loop-এ microtask vs macrotask কোনটা আগে?
questions.explain: Stack empty হলে সব microtask (Promise.then) drain, তারপর একটা macrotask (setTimeout)। Starvation-এর risk।
Short-circuit reject। বাকি Promise চলতেই থাকে, তবে result ignored। সব settle চাইলে Promise.allSettled।

questions.q: Arrow function ও regular function-এর key difference?
questions.explain: Arrow this/arguments/super/new.target-এ lexical। Method বা constructor হিসেবে unsuitable।
Macrotask - current sync code + microtask queue-এর পর। 4ms minimum clamp browser-এ।

options: call/apply তাত্ক্ষণিক invoke, bind নতুন function return
questions.explain: call(this, a, b), apply(this, [a, b]) - invoke। bind(this) - new function, later call।

options: Spread expand করে, rest collect করে
questions.explain: [...arr] spread। function(...args) rest। Syntax same (...), meaning context-dependent।

options: Chain-এ কোনো step null/undefined হলে short-circuit undefined return
questions.explain: a?.b?.c - intermediate null/undefined হলে undefined, error নেই। Legacy null-check ladder-এর replacement।

options: map new array return, forEach undefined
questions.explain: map = transform + return। forEach = iterate for side effect। Pipeline-এ map/filter/reduce chain করুন।

options: শুধু value undefined হলে (null হলে না)
questions.explain: {a = 5} = {a: null} → a = null। শুধু undefined হলে default fire।

options: Unique primitive, object key হিসেবে collision-free
questions.explain: Symbol('x') unique। Built-in Symbol.iterator, Symbol.asyncIterator - protocol hook।
function*, yield-এ pause। Lazy evaluation, custom iterator। Redux-saga-এর base।

options: ESM static + async + tree-shakable; CJS dynamic + sync
questions.explain: import compile-time, tree-shakable; require runtime, dynamic। Modern default ESM।

options: Top-level property immutable, nested object ফ্রোজেন না
questions.explain: Shallow freeze। Nested object আলাদা করে freeze করতে হয়। Object.isFrozen() check।
Object.prototype.__proto__ === null। Lookup fail হলে chain end, undefined return।
Array-like object-কে array বানায়। Second arg map-এ (_, i) => i দিলে index array।
Function, undefined, symbol - skip। Array-এ null replace। Date .toJSON() ISO string।
{...a}, Object.assign shallow। Deep-এর জন্য structuredClone(obj), lodash cloneDeep।
Sync প্রথম (1,4)। তারপর microtask drain (3)। তারপর macrotask (2)। Output: 1,4,3,2। Microtask queue সবসময় macrotask-এর আগে flush হয়।

questions.q: Node.js event loop-এর phase order কোনটা?
questions.explain: libuv phases: timers → pending callbacks → idle/prepare → poll → check (setImmediate) → close। প্রতি phase-এর মাঝে microtask + nextTick drain।

options: Call stack empty হলে, সব drain (nested সহ), তারপর পরবর্তী macrotask
questions.explain: Stack empty হলে Promise.then, queueMicrotask — সব drain, এমনকি drain-এর সময় যোগ হওয়া নতুন microtask-ও। Starvation risk।
Node-এ nextTickQueue microtask queue-এর আগে drain হয়। Recursive nextTick দিলে I/O starve করতে পারে।
Microtask queue macrotask-এর আগে drain। Plus browser-এ setTimeout-এ 4ms minimum clamp থাকে nested-এ।

options: interface declaration merge করে, type করে না; type union/tuple/primitive alias-এ flexible
questions.explain: Object shape-এ দুটোই interchangeable। Merge + extends-এ interface, union/tuple/mapped-এ type ভালো।

questions.q: function id<T>(x: T): T - কোথায় T infer হয়?
questions.explain: id(42) → T = number। Generic type erase হয় compile-এ, runtime-এ type নেই।
keyof object type-এর সব keys-এর union literal type দেয়। Generic indexed access-এর base।

questions.q: type R = T extends U ? X : Y union-এর উপর কী করে?
questions.explain: Conditional type naked type parameter-এ distribute। এড়াতে [T] extends [U] tuple wrap।

questions.q: type R = T extends (...a: any) => infer X ? X : never - infer-এর কাজ?
options: Conditional-এর ভেতরে নতুন type variable bind করে pattern match
questions.explain: infer type-level pattern match - function return, Promise unwrap, array element extract ইত্যাদিতে। Built-in ReturnType/Awaited-এর base।
{ [K in keyof T]?: T[K] }। Update DTO-তে বহুল ব্যবহৃত।

options: Pick বাছাই করা fields রাখে; Omit বাদ দেয়া fields ছাড়া বাকি রাখে
questions.explain: Subset derivation। Omit<User, 'password'> = safe user shape API return-এ।

options: unknown type-safe - narrow না করে use করা যায় না; any type check bypass
questions.explain: unknown হলো top type - যেকোনো value assign OK, কিন্তু ব্যবহারের আগে typeof/instanceof দিয়ে narrow করতে হয়।

questions.q: const x = { mode: 'dark' } as const - x.mode-এর type?
questions.explain: as const literal widening prevent করে। Object deep-readonly + literal types হয় - config object-এ দারুণ।

options: Value-এর type constraint-এ check হবে কিন্তু literal/narrow type preserve
questions.explain: const c = {...} satisfies Record<string, X> - type check হয় Record-এর সাথে, কিন্তু literal keys preserve হয় unlike assertion।

options: Exhaustive check (discriminated union switch), function যা throw/infinite loop, impossible intersection
questions.explain: assertNever(x: never) - switch-এর default-এ দিলে new variant add হলে compile error, exhaustive handling enforce।

options: Shared literal property (kind) দিয়ে switch/if-এ TS automatic narrow করে
questions.explain: { kind: 'a'; ...} | { kind: 'b'; ...}। if (x.kind === 'a')-এ block-এ TS proper variant জানে।

questions.q: Template literal type - `on${Capitalize<Event>}` কী generate করে?
questions.explain: String manipulation type-level-এ। Event handler type, route path inference ইত্যাদি library-এর power এখান থেকে।

options: Tuple type preserve - as const-এর সাথে use করলে exact element types infer হয়
questions.explain: function f<T extends readonly unknown[]>(x: T): T - f([1, 'a'] as const)-এ T = readonly [1, 'a'], widening হয় না।
async function return type extract-এ - nested Promise flatten কাজে লাগে। Recursive conditional type-এর built-in example।

questions.q: Variance - (x: Animal) => void-এ (x: Dog) => void assign?
options: না - function parameter contravariant। Safer to accept Animal (wider) for a slot expecting Dog-accepting fn, কিন্তু strict mode-এ TS নিষিদ্ধ
questions.explain: Method shorthand TS bivariant (historical), full <=> syntax strict contravariant। strictFunctionTypes flag এই difference enforce করে।

options: type JSON = string | number | boolean | null | JSON[] | { [k: string]: JSON }
questions.explain: TS type recursive হতে পারে - self-referential। Zod, tRPC heavy use করে। Depth limit ~50।

options: satisfies type-check করে কিন্তু narrow type preserve; as type check bypass করে - unsafe
questions.explain: const x = {...} satisfies T - T-এর constraint met কিনা verify + literal type keep। as T = "trust me bro" - avoid when possible।

options: Same function-এ multiple call signature expose - argument type-এর উপর return type depend
questions.explain:
function get(key: 'age'): number;
function get(key: 'name'): string;
function get(key: string): any { ... } - caller-এ precise return।

options: type DeepPartial<T> = { [K in keyof T]?: T[K] extends object ? DeepPartial<T[K]> : T[K] }
questions.explain: Recursive mapped type + conditional। Nested config, form state partial update-এ common।

options: Structural types-এর বদলে nominal safety - type UserId = string & { __brand: 'UserId' } দিয়ে accidental string mix block
questions.explain: TS structurally typed - UserId ও OrderId দুটোই string, interchangeable। Brand দিয়ে distinguish - compile-time safety for ID types।

questions.q: infer in template literal type - কেন powerful?
options: String pattern match type-level - type First<S> = S extends `${infer F}-${string}` ? F : never
questions.explain: Route param inference, CSS-in-JS type-safe class names, SQL query parser ইত্যাদি library-এর core। TS type-level programming-এর flagship feature।

options: function assertNever(x: never): never { throw new Error(x); } - switch default-এ call, new variant add হলে compile error
questions.explain: Type-driven safety - switch-এ case miss করলে TS-এই ধরা পড়ে। Product type add হলে পুরো codebase guide করে কোথায় update করতে হবে।
JSX pure JavaScript নয়। Bundler syntax transform করে। React 17+-এ new JSX transform - import React না লাগিয়েও চলে।

options: React reconciliation-এ child identity track করতে

questions.q: Functional component-এ state add করার hook?

Controlled - React state source of truth, value prop পায়। Uncontrolled - DOM own value, ref দিয়ে read।
Top-level (if/loop/nested function-এ না) এবং শুধু React function (component বা custom hook)-এ।
Props shallow equal → skip। Deep equal চাইলে custom comparator। Callback stable রাখতে useCallback।
useMemo(() => expensive(x), [x]) - deps unchanged হলে same value। Expensive calc cache।

questions.explain: Callback-কে memoize reference-wise। React.memo-এর child-এ prop stable রাখতে দরকার।

options: Consumer re-render সব - high-frequency update-এ problem

questions.q: Error Boundary কী catch করতে পারে?
questions.explain: Render-time error catch। Event handler (try/catch ব্যবহার করুন), async (Promise.catch), SSR - এগুলো catch হয় না।

options: Extra DOM wrapper ছাড়া multiple child return
questions.explain: <></> বা <Fragment> - DOM-এ কিছু add না করেই grouping।

options: Child ready না হওয়া পর্যন্ত (lazy, promise throw)

options: layoutEffect sync before paint, effect async after

options: Parent ref child DOM-এ forward করতে

options: State update-কে low-priority mark, urgent interaction smooth রাখে
questions.explain: Expensive render পিছিয়ে দেয়, typing-এর মতো urgent interaction unblocked। isPending boolean আসে।

options: Value-এর defer version, expensive child-কে older value দিয়ে UI smooth রাখে
questions.explain: Expensive list/chart-কে latest value না দিয়ে deferred value - typing smooth, list কিছুটা behind।
Label+input-এর id pair - SSR client-এ same id চাই। Math.random hydration mismatch দেয়।

options: ref expose-এর time কী method দিবে সেটা customize

options: Render interrupt + priority-based - urgent update আগে
questions.explain: Fiber-এর work-unit split + scheduling। React 18+-এ startTransition, Suspense enabled।

options: Child-কে parent DOM tree-এর বাইরে render, context unchanged

React 18 Tearing prevent করে। Store lib এটা use করে React-এর সাথে safely integrate।
lazy(() => import('./X')) promise throw করে, Suspense boundary fallback দেখায়।

questions.q: Render phase-এ কী করা safe নয়?

options: Date.now(), Math.random(), locale formatting - server/client output ভিন্ন

options: Automatic memoization - useMemo/useCallback manual লাগে না
questions.explain: Babel plugin - component code analyze করে যেখানে দরকার সেখানে auto memoize। Manual useMemo কমায়।

options: Promise throw করলে Suspense boundary fallback দেখায়, library (React Query v5, Relay) handle করে
questions.explain: Resource promise throw → nearest Suspense fallback। Library API `.suspend()` বা `use(promise)` (React 19)।
Both mark update as transition। Hook version UI-এ pending indicator দেখানোর জন্য boolean দেয়।

questions.q: Effect-এর dependency-এ object/array বারবার change দেখায় - fix?

props.children single/array/null হতে পারে। React.Children.map safely iterate এবং key handle করে।
Lazy import per-route। Router (React Router, TanStack) route-এ lazy component mount করে।

questions.q: React.memo-এর পর props একই কিন্তু তবু re-render - কারণ?

questions.explain: Parent-এ inline object/array/callback → নতুন reference → shallow compare fail। useMemo/useCallback বা lift করুন।
State change → component function re-run → new VDOM → diff with previous → minimal DOM patch।

options: Fine-grained signals - component একবার run, শুধু dependent DOM node update

reactive(obj) Proxy wrap করে, get/set-এ dependency track। Vue 2-এ Object.defineProperty ছিল।

options: Compile-time - compiler generate করে surgical DOM update
questions.explain: Build time-এ code transform। Runtime VDOM diff নেই - compiled output already optimal।

options: Concurrent render-এ একই store-এর ভিন্ন value দেখা
questions.explain: React 18 concurrent-এ render pause/restart হতে পারে। Store snapshot consistent রাখতে এই hook।

options: Push: producer update consumer-এ পাঠায়; Pull: consumer demand-এ fetch
questions.explain: Observable (RxJS) push। Iterator (generator) pull। React state hybrid - push-triggered, pull-evaluated।
Mutation-এ reference same → memo/React.memo skip → UI stale। নতুন object/array দিয়ে replace।

options: New object তৈরিতে unchanged part-এর reference reuse
questions.explain: Immer, Immutable.js-এর core। Large tree update-এ performance - শুধু changed path copy।
Stream of values over time। Operator chain (map, filter, debounceTime)। Subscription cancelable।

questions.q: Signals-এ কেন manual memoization কম লাগে?
options: Fine-grained dependency - শুধু যে node depend সেটাই update
questions.explain: SolidJS/Signals framework dependency precise track করে। React-এ parent re-render child-কে নিয়ে যায়, tai memo।

questions.q: Context value-এ object দিলে সব consumer re-render - সমাধান?

questions.explain: Value reference change হলে সব consumer re-render। Context split, memoize, useContextSelector/Zustand।

options: Effect captured closure দিয়ে পুরনো value use করে যদি dependency miss
questions.explain: Effect function creation-time-এর variable hold। Dep array-এ সব referenced value দিন, বা ref pattern।
observable, action, computed। Getter access auto-subscribe। Transparent reactivity।

options: 10K item list-এও DOM-এ শুধু visible items, scroll smooth

react-window Brian Vaughn-এর, lighter। @tanstack/react-virtual hook-based, framework-agnostic, variable size flexible।

questions.q: Variable height list virtualize-এ কী challenge?

questions.explain: Fixed size simple। Variable-এ rendered item measure, rest estimate। Scroll jumps avoid - carefully update।

options: Search input - user থামলে API call

questions.explain: NoSQL ≠ fast/better by default। Specific access pattern + scale = DynamoDB/Cassandra। Complex query + relation = SQL।

questions.q: Redis-এর কোনটা valid data structure নয়?
questions.explain: Redis native: String, List, Set, Hash, Sorted Set (ZSet), Bitmap, HyperLogLog, Stream, Geospatial। JSON RedisJSON module দিয়ে আসে।

options: RDB (point-in-time snapshot) + AOF (every-write append log) - hybrid recommended
questions.explain: RDB fast restore, কিছু data loss। AOF durable, larger। Production সাধারণত appendonly yes + RDB snapshots।

questions.q: Redis vs Memcached - Redis-এর distinct advantage?
options: Rich data structures, pub/sub, scripts, streams, replication, persistence
questions.explain: Memcached pure KV cache (multi-threaded)। Redis single-threaded কিন্তু rich features। Use-case: pure hot cache → Memcached, anything more → Redis।

options: Least Recently Used - oldest-access-এর key evict
questions.explain: Redis maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru, volatile-lru, allkeys-lfu (frequency), volatile-ttl। Default noeviction - write fail।

options: Eventually consistent (write-propagation ~60s global), optimized for read-heavy
questions.explain: Globally distributed KV, read edge থেকে। Frequent write / strong consistency need হলে use করবেন না - Durable Objects বা D1 ব্যবহার করুন।

options: FoundationDB-backed, strong consistency + ACID transactions across keys
questions.explain: Distributed strong consistency। kv.atomic() multi-key transaction। Deno Deploy-এ globally replicated।

questions.q: MongoDB document vs SQL row - core পার্থক্য?
options: Document nested JSON (array, sub-document), schema-flexible; row flat column, rigid schema
questions.explain: Embed vs reference trade-off। Related data একসাথে read করতে চাইলে embed, cardinality high হলে reference।

options: Branching (git-like DB branch per PR), scale-to-zero, HTTP/TCP-friendly
questions.explain: Preview env per branch, no provisioning। Neon storage copy-on-write। Cold start বাড়ে idle-এ scale-to-zero-এর trade-off।
Edge-replicated SQLite। Turso libSQL fork - replication + HTTP API। D1 Cloudflare-এর Workers-native SQLite।

options: Embedding (float vector) store + similarity search (cosine/dot-product), RAG retrieval-এর core
questions.explain: Top-K nearest neighbor। Postgres pgvector বেশিরভাগ use case-এ enough; scale-এ Pinecone/Weaviate/Qdrant।

options: Partitioning = single DB-এ table-কে split; Sharding = different physical DB / node-এ split
questions.explain: Postgres native partitioning (range/list/hash) single instance-এ। Sharding app-level বা Citus/Vitess - multiple nodes।

questions.q: Job queue use করার main reason কী?
options: Long-running task decouple করে async process, retry, backpressure, scale
questions.explain: Email, image processing, webhook - request lifecycle-এর বাইরে। Producer enqueue, worker process - retry/scale independent।

questions.q: BullMQ underlying কোন store ব্যবহার করে?
questions.explain: Node.js-এ Redis-এর উপর built। Sorted set দিয়ে priority + delay implement। Bull → BullMQ (v5 modern)।

questions.q: Celery typically কোন broker-এর সাথে run করে?
questions.explain: Python ecosystem-এর default task queue। RabbitMQ historically default, Redis now popular, কখনো SQS/Kafka।

questions.q: RabbitMQ primarily কোন protocol implement করে?
questions.explain: Advanced Message Queuing Protocol - open standard। MQTT, STOMP plugin-ও আছে।
Messages immutable log-এ append। Consumer নিজের offset track করে replay possible। Event sourcing + stream processing-এর foundation।

questions.q: Task Queue vs Pub/Sub vs Event Stream - fundamental পার্থক্য?
options: Task queue: 1 worker consume; Pub/Sub: সব subscriber copy; Stream: replay-able ordered log
questions.explain: Task queue = competing consumer। Pub/Sub = fanout। Stream = durable log, multi-consumer-group replay।

questions.q: At-least-once delivery-এ consumer-এ কী implement করা জরুরি?
options: Idempotency - same message দুইবার process করলেও same effect
questions.explain: Broker retry করে duplicate পাঠাতে পারে। Idempotency key (order_id, hash) দিয়ে already processed check - database unique constraint বা Redis SETNX।

options: Max retry fail-এর পর message যেখানে যায় - manual inspection / alert
questions.explain: Poison message loop আটকায়। Alert + dashboard - ops team investigate করে root cause fix, তারপর reprocess।

options: Failed job retry-তে delay doubles - downstream overload এড়াতে
questions.explain: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s... + jitter। Thundering herd / retry storm prevent - fail হওয়া service-কে recover-এর সময় দেয়।

questions.q: SQS Standard vs FIFO queue-এর মূল পার্থক্য?
options: Standard: unlimited throughput + at-least-once (duplicate সম্ভব); FIFO: ordered + exactly-once, 3000 msg/sec limit
questions.explain: FIFO message deduplication window 5 min। Standard-এ application-level idempotency লাগে।

options: Topic-কে parallel consumption-এর জন্য split; ordering per-partition guaranteed
questions.explain: Partition key দিয়ে message routed। Same key → same partition → order preserved। Parallelism = partition count।

options: একই group-এর consumers partitions ভাগ করে - each partition one consumer; different group independent
questions.explain: Consumer group = load balance। Rebalance করে consumer add/remove-এ। Multiple groups = broadcast pattern।

options: সব bound queue-এ copy - routing key ignore
questions.explain: Broadcast। Direct (exact match), Topic (pattern like order.#), Headers (attribute match) other exchange types।

questions.q: Delayed job schedule-এ BullMQ কী use করে?
options: Redis sorted set - score = execution timestamp, worker poll
questions.explain: ZADD-এ timestamp score। ZRANGEBYSCORE-এ ready jobs pull। Cron pattern-ও support (repeat-every-N)।

questions.q: Cron job vs job queue-এর পার্থক্য?
options: Cron = scheduler (কখন chase করবে); queue = execution infra (fail, retry, scale)। প্রায়ই combined - cron enqueues, queue runs
questions.explain: Cron trigger-এ scalability/retry নেই। Production-এ cron → queue.add() pattern - reliability পাওয়া যায়।

options: Consumer-এ message pulled হলে অন্য consumer-এর কাছ থেকে N সেকেন্ড hide; timeout-এর আগে delete না করলে redeliver
questions.explain: Worker processing-এ crash করলে message আবার available। Worker job long হলে heartbeat-এর মতো extend করতে হয়।

questions.q: Worker concurrency বাড়ালে কখন problem হতে পারে?
options: Downstream service (DB, 3rd-party API) overwhelm - rate limit বা rate-limiter প্রয়োজন
questions.explain: Bottleneck downstream-এ shift হয়। Queue-এর সাথে concurrency limit + rate limit (per-sec) tune করুন।

options: Event replay, account balance update, audit log - sequence matter করে
questions.explain: Kafka per-partition order। SQS FIFO group-per-order। Ordering চাইলে throughput sacrifice, tai carefully partition design।

questions.q: Retry storm / cascade failure prevent করার technique?
options: Exponential backoff + jitter + circuit breaker + DLQ
questions.explain: Jitter randomize করে sync retry আটকায়। Circuit breaker downstream fail-এ retry পুরো বন্ধ। DLQ poison message isolate।

options: Durable execution / workflow - function state DB-এ persist, crash হলে resume exact point-এ
questions.explain: Long-running multi-step workflow (days/weeks) - saga/retry/compensation built-in। Code-first workflow ভাষা।

options: Broker (Redis/RabbitMQ): high throughput, built-in primitives; DB queue (Postgres SKIP LOCKED): transactional, simple stack
questions.explain: Low volume + same DB transaction-এ enqueue চাইলে Postgres SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED দারুণ (pg-boss, graphile-worker)।

options: Message N time/size পর্যন্ত log-এ থাকে, consumer পরে join করেও পেতে পারে - queue-এ থাকে না এই feature
questions.explain: 7 days default retention। Replay, late consumer, event sourcing - Kafka-এর key advantage traditional queue-এর উপর।

questions.q: Exactly-once delivery achieve-এ সবচেয়ে practical approach?
options: At-least-once + idempotent consumer = effective exactly-once processing
questions.explain: Distributed system-এ true exactly-once কঠিন। Kafka transactions বা dedup-এর সাহায্যে approximate। সাধারণত idempotent processing সবচেয়ে reliable।

options: Parent job child jobs spawn করে, সব child done হলে parent complete - saga/DAG pattern
questions.explain: Image upload → thumbnail, preview, OCR parallel child → report generate parent - flow dependency describe।

questions.q: Kafka-এ "at-least-once" achieve-এ consumer কী করতে হয়?
options: Message process হওয়ার পর offset commit - process-এর আগে commit হলে crash-এ loss
questions.explain: Default enable.auto.commit=true-এ periodic commit। Reliability-এ manual commit after successful handle।
Render-এ শুধু viewport rows। Pagination UX trade-off; virtualization transparent।

questions.q: প্রতি keystroke পুরো page re-render। কী করবেন?
options: Form state-কে নিচে (form component-এ) colocate বা react-hook-form
questions.explain: Top-level state বাসা-বাসি re-render। Colocation বা uncontrolled + field subscription।

options: Log aggregator + APM trace, DB connection, downstream timeout check
questions.explain: Observability প্রথম। Correlation ID specific request trace। Root cause-এ fix।

options: Bundle analyzer দিয়ে offender identify, code split, tree-shake, replace heavy lib
questions.explain: Data-driven optimization। Often moment/lodash/SDK-এ heavy culprit।

options: Eager loading / DataLoader batch + query log monitor
questions.explain: ORM-এ include/select_related। GraphQL-এ DataLoader batch।

questions.q: New API version breaks old mobile client। strategy?
options: URL versioning (/v1 keep), deprecation header, metric-driven sunset
questions.explain: Backward compat period। Usage metric দেখে kill decision।

questions.q: Node heap increasing over time (leak)। debug?
options: Heap snapshot × 2 + diff; common: unbounded cache, listener, closure, timer
questions.explain: --inspect, Chrome DevTools Memory tab। Retained growth path investigate।

options: Output encode (React default safe), CSP, input validate, HttpOnly cookie
questions.explain: Defense in depth। Library-level escape, CSP script-src strict, user-content scoped iframe।

questions.q: Cache stampede (একসাথে many miss → DB flood)। fix?
options: Lock + single refresh, probabilistic early expiration, stale-while-revalidate
questions.explain: Dog-piling prevent। Redis SETNX lock, background refresh, SWR (stale-while-revalidate)।

options: Bounded context identify, Strangler fig pattern piece-by-piece extract, observability day-1
questions.explain: Gradual extraction। API gateway facade, event bus async, service-owned DB।

tips:
Interview Tips ও Strategies

Junior role-এ সব framework মাস্টার করতে হবে না। Fundamentals solid করুন, project build করুন, trade-off বুঝিয়ে বলতে শিখুন।

STAR method - Behavioral questions

S - Situation

Context - কখন, কোথায়, কী project।

T - Task

আপনার specific দায়িত্ব কী ছিল।

A - Action

আপনি কী করেছিলেন, কী decision।

R - Result

Outcome - metric/impact দিয়ে যদি পারেন।

Common behavioral questions

  • "Hardest bug তুমি fix করেছ - কী শিখলে?"
  • "Senior-এর সাথে disagreement - কীভাবে handle?"
  • "Deadline tight - কী cut করলে?"
  • "আগের project-এ technical debt কীভাবে address করেছ?"

Frontend interview তে ভালো করার 7 tips

  1. Vanilla JS + DOM ভালোভাবে জানুন - Framework abstraction-এর নিচে এটাই। Promise, event loop, prototype chain - core।
  2. Build real project - Todo list বাদ দিন, infinite scroll feed, virtualized table, form builder - production-grade pattern।
  3. React DevTools Profile ব্যবহার শিখুন - Re-render cause dekhao, memoization দ্বিধার জায়গায় এটাই answer।
  4. Accessibility জানুন - Keyboard nav, ARIA, semantic HTML - companies এটা increasingly expect।
  5. CSS layout mastery - Flex vs Grid, responsive, container query - interview common।
  6. Performance metric বোঝান - LCP, CLS, INP; optimization rationale।
  7. State management trade-off - "কেন Zustand বাছলেন?" - bundle, boilerplate, learning curve - actual reason।

Backend interview তে ভালো করার 7 tips

  1. HTTP spec জানুন - Status code, methods, headers, caching - foundation।
  2. Database internals - Index, EXPLAIN, transaction isolation - Junior-এও expect।
  3. OOP + SOLID concrete example - "একবার OCP apply করে X ship করেছি" - principle নাম জানার চেয়ে example দামি।
  4. Design pattern দুই-তিনটা deep - Singleton, Factory, Observer, Strategy - code-এ কোথায় ব্যবহার বলতে পারুন।
  5. Auth জানুন - Session vs JWT, OAuth basics, CSRF, CORS - security-aware developer মূল্যবান।
  6. Error handling + logging - Structured log, correlation ID, retry + circuit breaker - production mindset।
  7. Basic system design - Load balancer, cache layer, DB replication - Junior-এ shallow ঠিক আছে, জানা থাকলে impressive।

Portfolio Projects - যা interview-এ দেখাতে পারেন

1. Virtualized Feed

10K item, infinite scroll, skeleton loading, optimistic update।

2. Form Builder

Dynamic schema → form, Zod validation, react-hook-form।

3. Realtime Chat

WebSocket (Bun.serve), presence, typing indicator।

4. REST API

Express + Postgres, controller/service/repo layer, OpenAPI doc।

5. Auth Service

JWT access + refresh, bcrypt, rate limit, email verify।

6. Admin Dashboard

Table pagination (cursor), filter, bulk actions।

শেষে আপনি কী জিজ্ঞেস করবেন?

Interviewer "Any questions?" - কখনো "No" না।

  • "আপনাদের code review process কেমন?"
  • "Team-এর deployment cadence?"
  • "Junior-এর জন্য প্রথম 3 মাসে কী expect?"
  • "On-call rotation + incident process?"
  • "Technical debt কীভাবে prioritize করেন?"
  • "Mentorship/learning budget?"
🚀 Good luck! Fundamentals solid, real project build, trade-off বুঝিয়ে বলতে পারাই Junior role-এ সবচেয়ে বড় advantage।
